name: "Slut Control" App
description:
A remake and cleanup of @samy_333's character.

Initially this seems to be made for MLM, but I've changed it to be AnyPov and able to affect both men and women. Check the personality setting to know more. There are themes of Non-Con in this bot. Heed the Dead Dove.

This is my first bot!! Please give constructive criticism!

̶N̶o̶t̶ ̶t̶e̶s̶t̶e̶d̶ ̶a̶t̶ ̶a̶l̶l̶ ̶b̶e̶c̶a̶u̶s̶e̶ ̶I̶'̶m̶ ̶l̶a̶z̶y̶ ̶a̶s̶ ̶s̶h̶i̶t̶.̶ Lightly tested. Let me know if something fucks up. Don't complain about bot speaking for you or other LLM problems, I have no control over that no matter how much I try to dissuade the bot from doing it in the personality.

If the original creator wants this taken down, just say so in the comments and I will remove it.
creator: Pylon_Person
